subcodes.first_line: O ye who are firm in the Covenant! Your letter hath arrived, and its contents betokened the blazing fire of the love of God in your hearts. That gathering was a heavenly assemblage
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و مضمون دلالت بر فوران نار محبت الله در قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love of God
